ea_completion_report.purpose: Independent-verification report for the Guide agent. Every claim below must be reproducible by the Guide running the verification commands in the <verification_recipes> section against the working tree and the single commit produced this session (ccdd82b). Diff snippets embedded verbatim so the Guide can audit pattern compliance without re-deriving them.

ground_truth_at_emission.git_head_subject: docs(platform_separation): Stage 2 mid-stage EA handoff v3 -- item 2.4 partial (6 of 13 entrypoints), resume at file 7 (self_check.py)
ground_truth_at_emission.stash_top: stash@{0}: On main: wake_launcher auto-stash sdo 20260424_013002

commits_this_session_list.commit: docs(platform_separation): Stage 2 mid-stage EA handoff v3 -- item 2.4 partial (6 of 13 entrypoints), resume at file 7 (self_check.py)

item.description: Refactor 13 entrypoint files to accept --project-root / --project-id, resolve a ProjectContext via tools._project_context.resolve(), and pass explicit BlarAI-derived paths to config_loader.load_config(). Defaults must produce byte-identical behavior to pre-refactor when no flags are passed (verified via canonical default chain: ctx.name="BlarAI" → ctx.name.lower()="blarai" → existing projects/blarai.yaml overlay).
item.canonical_pattern_template:
import argparse from tools import _project_context from tools.autonomy_budget import config_loader
def _build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser: parser = argparse.ArgumentParser(description="<entrypoint description>") parser.add_argument("--project-root", type=str, default=None, help="Project root directory (defaults to BlarAI).") parser.add_argument("--project-id", type=int, default=None, help="Vikunja project_id of the project (sanity-checked vs registry).") return parser
def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int: args = _build_parser().parse_args(argv) ctx = _project_context.resolve(args.project_root, args.project_id) cfg = config_loader.load_config( path=ctx.root / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "config.yaml", project_overlay_path=ctx.root / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "projects" / f"{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml", ) ...

file.diff_verbatim:
@@ -9,9 +9,11 @@ runbook link. Non-blocking; LA rotates at convenience. """ from __future__ import annotations
+import argparse import sys from datetime import datetime, timezone
+from tools import _project_context from tools.autonomy_budget import config_loader from tools.fleet_observability._vikunja_client import LiveVikunjaClient
@@ -19,8 +21,36 @@ from tools.fleet_observability._vikunja_client import LiveVikunjaClient TITLE = "Rotate Anthropic API key"
-def main() -> int: - cfg = config_loader.load_config() +def _build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser: + parser = argparse.ArgumentParser( + description="90-day Anthropic API key rotation reminder.", + ) + parser.add_argument( + "--project-root", type=str, default=None, + help="Project root directory (defaults to BlarAI).", + ) + parser.add_argument( + "--project-id", type=int, default=None, + help="Vikunja project_id of the project (sanity-checked vs registry).", + ) + return parser + + +def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int: + args = _build_parser().parse_args(argv) + ctx = _project_context.resolve(args.project_root, args.project_id) + cfg = config_loader.load_config( + path=ctx.root / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "config.yaml", + project_overlay_path=ctx.root + / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "projects" + / f"{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml", + ) client = LiveVikunjaClient()

@@ -18,10 +18,12 @@ Algorithm: """ from __future__ import annotations
+import argparse import sys from datetime import datetime, timezone from pathlib import Path
+from tools import _project_context from tools.autonomy_budget import config_loader, la_activity, state from tools.fleet_observability._vikunja_client import LiveVikunjaClient
@@ -49,8 +51,36 @@ def _parse(ts: str | None) -> datetime | None: return la_activity._parse_iso(ts) if hasattr(la_activity, "_parse_iso") else None
-def main() -> int: - cfg = config_loader.load_config() +def _build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser: + parser = argparse.ArgumentParser( + description="Welcome-back digest producer (M1 per DEC-11 §3.3).", + ) + parser.add_argument("--project-root", type=str, default=None, + help="Project root directory (defaults to BlarAI).") + parser.add_argument("--project-id", type=int, default=None, + help="Vikunja project_id of the project (sanity-checked vs registry).") + return parser + + +def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int: + args = _build_parser().parse_args(argv) + ctx = _project_context.resolve(args.project_root, args.project_id) + cfg = config_loader.load_config( + path=ctx.root / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "config.yaml", + project_overlay_path=ctx.root + / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "projects" + / f"{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml", + ) live = LiveVikunjaClient()

helper_handling.decision: build_digest() previously called config_loader.load_config() itself; refactored to accept *, ctx: ProjectContext | None = None with auto-resolve fallback.
_git_log_oneline_since() refactored to accept repo_root: Path = REPO_ROOT kwarg; module-level REPO_ROOT preserved for legacy in-process callers.
main() now passes ctx=ctx down to build_digest() so the resolved context flows through the entire call graph.
helper_handling.verification_focus: Guide MUST verify build_digest()'s ctx kwarg has correct default (None → resolve() fallback) AND that main() does NOT call build_digest() without ctx.

file.diff_verbatim:
@@ -19,21 +19,25 @@ Outputs: """ from __future__ import annotations
+import argparse import subprocess import sys from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone from pathlib import Path
+from tools import _project_context from tools.autonomy_budget import config_loader from tools.fleet_observability._vikunja_client import LiveVikunjaClient
+# Default for legacy in-process callers; main() / build_digest() take an explicit +# ProjectContext so the path can be redirected for non-BlarAI projects. REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
-def _git_log_oneline_since(since_iso: str) -> list[str]: +def _git_log_oneline_since(since_iso: str, repo_root: Path = REPO_ROOT) -> list[str]: try: out = subprocess.check_output( - ["git", "-C", str(REPO_ROOT), "log", f"--since={since_iso}", "--oneline"], + ["git", "-C", str(repo_root), "log", f"--since={since_iso}", "--oneline"], ... @@ -70,13 +74,28 @@ def _gate_queue_snapshot(...
-def build_digest(client: LiveVikunjaClient) -> str: - cfg = config_loader.load_config() +def build_digest( + client: LiveVikunjaClient, + *, + ctx: "_project_context.ProjectContext | None" = None, +) -> str: + if ctx is None: + ctx = _project_context.resolve() + cfg = config_loader.load_config( + path=ctx.root / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "config.yaml", + project_overlay_path=ctx.root + / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "projects" + / f"{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml", + ) now = datetime.now(timezone.utc) since = now - timedelta(hours=24)
- runs = _scan_logs_for_runs(REPO_ROOT / "tools/scheduled-tasks/logs", since) - commits = _git_log_oneline_since(since.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")) + runs = _scan_logs_for_runs(ctx.root / "tools/scheduled-tasks/logs", since) + commits = _git_log_oneline_since( + since.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"), repo_root=ctx.root + ) queue = _gate_queue_snapshot(client, int(cfg["vikunja"]["agent_gates_project_id"])) @@ -125,13 +144,41 @@ def build_digest(...
-def main() -> int: +def _build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser: + ... (canonical _build_parser body) + +def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int: + args = _build_parser().parse_args(argv) + ctx = _project_context.resolve(args.project_root, args.project_id) client = LiveVikunjaClient() if not client.health_check(): print("Vikunja unreachable; daily digest aborting.", file=sys.stderr) return 3 - cfg = config_loader.load_config() - body = build_digest(client) + cfg = config_loader.load_config( + path=ctx.root / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "config.yaml", + project_overlay_path=ctx.root + / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "projects" + / f"{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml", + ) + body = build_digest(client, ctx=ctx)

helper_handling.decision: Symmetric to daily_digest.py: build_summary() takes *, ctx kwarg; _git_log_stats() takes repo_root kwarg; module-level REPO_ROOT preserved.

file.diff_verbatim:
@@ -8,14 +8,18 @@ Project 4 task titled "[auto] Weekly summary <ISO-week-start>". """ from __future__ import annotations
+import argparse import subprocess import sys from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone from pathlib import Path
+from tools import _project_context from tools.autonomy_budget import config_loader from tools.fleet_observability._vikunja_client import LiveVikunjaClient
+# Default for legacy in-process callers; build_summary() / main() take an +# explicit ProjectContext so paths can be redirected for non-BlarAI projects. REPO_ROOT = Path(__file__).resolve().parents[2]
@@ -28,10 +32,12 @@ def _iso_week_span(...
-def _git_log_stats(since: datetime, until: datetime) -> dict[str, int]: +def _git_log_stats( + since: datetime, until: datetime, repo_root: Path = REPO_ROOT +) -> dict[str, int]: try: out = subprocess.check_output( - ["git", "-C", str(REPO_ROOT), "log", + ["git", "-C", str(repo_root), "log", ... @@ -44,11 +50,24 @@ def _git_log_stats(...
-def build_summary(client: LiveVikunjaClient) -> tuple[str, str]: - cfg = config_loader.load_config() +def build_summary( + client: LiveVikunjaClient, + *, + ctx: "_project_context.ProjectContext | None" = None, +) -> tuple[str, str]: + if ctx is None: + ctx = _project_context.resolve() + cfg = config_loader.load_config( + path=ctx.root / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "config.yaml", + project_overlay_path=ctx.root + / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "projects" + / f"{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml", + ) now = datetime.now(timezone.utc) start, end = _iso_week_span(now) - stats = _git_log_stats(start, end) + stats = _git_log_stats(start, end, repo_root=ctx.root) @@ -79,13 +98,41 @@ def build_summary(...
-def main() -> int: +def _build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser: + ... (canonical _build_parser body) + +def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int: + args = _build_parser().parse_args(argv) + ctx = _project_context.resolve(args.project_root, args.project_id) client = LiveVikunjaClient() if not client.health_check(): print("Vikunja unreachable; weekly summary aborting.", file=sys.stderr) return 3 - cfg = config_loader.load_config() - title, body = build_summary(client) + cfg = config_loader.load_config( + path=ctx.root / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "config.yaml", + project_overlay_path=ctx.root + / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "projects" + / f"{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml", + ) + title, body = build_summary(client, ctx=ctx)

file.known_pre_existing_issue: File contains `live._request("POST", ...)` private-method abuse on the LiveVikunjaClient API. NOT addressed in 2.4 (out of scope). Successor should add this to the item-2.6 disposition list.
file.diff_verbatim:
@@ -12,10 +12,12 @@ is created in Theme E. Until then, this module: """ from __future__ import annotations
+import argparse import sys from datetime import datetime, timezone from typing import Any
+from tools import _project_context from tools.autonomy_budget import config_loader from tools.fleet_observability._vikunja_client import LiveVikunjaClient
@@ -58,8 +60,36 @@ def _build_summary(name: str, live: LiveVikunjaClient, cfg: dict[str, Any]) -> s return f"Generated: {now}\n\n(Not yet populated; implementation pending in Theme E.)"
-def main() -> int: - cfg = config_loader.load_config() +def _build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser: + ... (canonical _build_parser body, description="M12 Fleet Dashboard maintainer.") + +def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int: + args = _build_parser().parse_args(argv) + ctx = _project_context.resolve(args.project_root, args.project_id) + cfg = config_loader.load_config( + path=ctx.root / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "config.yaml", + project_overlay_path=ctx.root + / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "projects" + / f"{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml", + ) live = LiveVikunjaClient()

helper_handling.decision: cleaner.run_sweep() receives the resolved cfg and live client unchanged; cleaner library itself is config-agnostic at this layer (item 2.6 will assess whether deeper changes are needed).

file.diff_verbatim:
@@ -8,14 +8,37 @@ task's log capture. """ from __future__ import annotations
+import argparse import sys
+from tools import _project_context from tools.autonomy_budget import config_loader from tools.fleet_observability._vikunja_client import LiveVikunjaClient from tools.gate_stale_cleaner import cleaner
-def main() -> int: +def _build_parser() -> argparse.ArgumentParser: + ... (canonical _build_parser body, description="Gate-stale-cleaner module entrypoint.") + +def main(argv: list[str] | None = None) -> int: + args = _build_parser().parse_args(argv) + ctx = _project_context.resolve(args.project_root, args.project_id) live = LiveVikunjaClient() if not live.health_check(): print("Vikunja unreachable; gate-stale cleaner aborting.", file=sys.stderr) @@ -24,7 +47,14 @@ def main() -> int: # LiveVikunjaClient implements the VikunjaClient Protocol that cleaner expects # (list_open_gates, list_labels, add_label_to_task, remove_label_from_task, # add_comment, update_task_priority). No adapter layer required. - cfg = config_loader.load_config() + cfg = config_loader.load_config( + path=ctx.root / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "config.yaml", + project_overlay_path=ctx.root + / "tools" / "autonomy_budget" / "projects" + / f"{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml", + ) report = cleaner.run_sweep(client=live, config=cfg)

file.approach: canonical pattern; verify no helpers internally call load_config
line 92 hardcoded `repo_root: Path | str = Path(r"C:/Users/mrbla/BlarAI")` default → replace with ProjectContext resolution; verify all callers
library file; likely no change needed (config injected by caller); VERIFY no module-level REPO_ROOT or load_config call
LEGACY shim — item 2.4 should NOT change behavior; item 2.6 will dispose of it. EA must verify nothing here calls load_config
LARGEST file — 19 MCP handlers; canonical pattern at module init; project_id required-kwarg discipline; LIKELY needs its own session

quality_attestations.attestation: All 6 refactored files were re-validated this turn via `python -m py_compile`. Every file returned exit code 0. Reproducible by Guide.

When invoked with no flags, `_project_context.resolve(None, None)` returns ctx with root=DEFAULT_BLARAI_ROOT and name="BlarAI" (via 5-step resolution chain). Therefore `f"{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml"` = `"blarai.yaml"` which matches the existing `tools/autonomy_budget/projects/blarai.yaml` overlay. Resulting load_config(path=..., project_overlay_path=...) is byte-equivalent to the prior `load_config()` no-arg call.

Diff inspection confirms all 6 files use the EXACT same _build_parser argument names (--project-root, --project-id), EXACT same main() signature (`argv: list[str] | None = None`), EXACT same load_config kwarg spelling (path=, project_overlay_path=).

Files with helpers that themselves called load_config (daily_digest, weekly_summary) received `*, ctx: ProjectContext | None = None` kwarg with auto-resolve fallback AND main() now passes ctx=ctx in. Files with helpers using module-level REPO_ROOT preserved REPO_ROOT for backward compatibility AND added repo_root kwarg defaulting to REPO_ROOT.

Only ONE commit was made this session (ccdd82b). It is docs-only (the v3 mid-stage handoff XML, 1 file changed, +291/-0). Refactor work remains UNCOMMITTED in working tree per the binding ack i1-4 and the Stage-2 single-commit-at-2.9 rule.
Fleet remained paused for the entire session. No `state.resume_fleet(...)` call was made. state.json `fleet_paused` remains true with reason `"platform separation v2 in progress"`.
stash@{0} (`wake_launcher auto-stash sdo 20260424_013002`) is byte-identical to its state at session start. No `git stash pop`, `git stash drop`, or `git stash apply` was issued.

work_skipped.note: No 2.4 work-items were skipped. The remaining 7 of 13 files are PENDING (not skipped) and are listed in <files_remaining> above with documented per-file approach guidance.

work_remaining_in_2.4.files_pending: See <files_remaining> above for the canonical execution order.

subitems_pending.subitem: Optional second-pass review of all 13 files for canonical-pattern drift.

errors_encountered.note: Zero compile errors. Zero runtime errors (no runtime tests executed — would require live Vikunja). Zero pattern-compliance violations detected on self-audit. Zero git-state surprises.

recipe.purpose: Confirm single docs-only commit + clean working-tree refactor delta
recipe.commands:
git log --oneline -1 # Expect: ccdd82b docs(platform_separation): Stage 2 mid-stage EA handoff v3 ...
git show --stat ccdd82b # Expect: 1 file changed, 291 insertions, file = docs/platform_separation/ea_outputs/EA_HANDOFF_STAGE2_MIDSTAGE_v3.xml
git diff --stat # Expect 6 refactor files in working tree: # tools/fleet_observability/credential_rotation_reminder.py | 34 +++++- # tools/fleet_observability/welcome_back_digest.py | 34 +++++- # tools/fleet_observability/daily_digest.py | 65 +++++++++-- # tools/fleet_observability/weekly_summary.py | 63 +++++++++-- # tools/fleet_observability/dashboard_maintainer.py | 34 +++++- # tools/gate_stale_cleaner/run_live.py | 34 +++++- # Plus inherited Stage-2 work from v2: pyproject.toml, config.yaml, config_loader.py, test_config_loader.py

recipe.purpose: Pattern-compliance grep — every refactored file must contain the canonical fragments
recipe.commands: $files = @( 'tools/fleet_observability/credential_rotation_reminder.py', 'tools/fleet_observability/welcome_back_digest.py', 'tools/fleet_observability/daily_digest.py', 'tools/fleet_observability/weekly_summary.py', 'tools/fleet_observability/dashboard_maintainer.py', 'tools/gate_stale_cleaner/run_live.py' ) foreach ($f in $files) { $c = Get-Content $f -Raw $checks = @{ 'argparse import' = $c -match 'import argparse' '_project_context import' = $c -match 'from tools import _project_context' '--project-root flag' = $c -match '"--project-root"' '--project-id flag' = $c -match '"--project-id"' 'main(argv signature' = $c -match 'def main\(argv: list\[str\] \| None = None\)' 'ctx = resolve()' = $c -match '_project_context\.resolve\(' 'load_config(path=...)' = $c -match 'config_loader\.load_config\(\s*path=ctx\.root' 'projects/{name}.yaml' = $c -match 'f"\{ctx\.name\.lower\(\)\}\.yaml"' } Write-Host "=== $f ===" $checks.GetEnumerator() | ForEach-Object { Write-Host (" " + $_.Key + ": " + $_.Value) } } # Expect every check = True for every file.

recipe.purpose: Defaults preservation — confirm no-flag invocation resolves to BlarAI overlay
recipe.commands:
python -c "from tools import _project_context; ctx = _project_context.resolve(None, None); print(repr(ctx))" # Expect: ProjectContext with root pointing at the BlarAI repo root, # name='BlarAI', vikunja_project_id consistent with registry.
python -c "from tools import _project_context; ctx = _project_context.resolve(None, None); print(f'overlay = {ctx.root}/tools/autonomy_budget/projects/{ctx.name.lower()}.yaml')" # Expect path resolves to an existing file (projects/blarai.yaml).

recipe.purpose: Helper-handling integrity — daily_digest + weekly_summary preserve REPO_ROOT and accept ctx
recipe.commands:
python -c "import inspect; from tools.fleet_observability import daily_digest as m; print('REPO_ROOT exists:', hasattr(m, 'REPO_ROOT')); sig_b = inspect.signature(m.build_digest); print('build_digest sig:', sig_b); sig_g = inspect.signature(m._git_log_oneline_since); print('_git_log_oneline_since sig:', sig_g)" # Expect: # REPO_ROOT exists: True # build_digest sig: (client: ...LiveVikunjaClient, *, ctx: ...ProjectContext | None = None) -> str # _git_log_oneline_since sig: (since_iso: str, repo_root: ...Path = ...) -> list[str]
python -c "import inspect; from tools.fleet_observability import weekly_summary as m; print('REPO_ROOT exists:', hasattr(m, 'REPO_ROOT')); print('build_summary sig:', inspect.signature(m.build_summary)); print('_git_log_stats sig:', inspect.signature(m._git_log_stats))" # Expect equivalent kwargs present.

git stash list # Expect: stash@{0}: On main: wake_launcher auto-stash sdo 20260424_013002
(Get-Content tools/autonomy_budget/state.json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object fleet_paused, fleet_paused_reason | ConvertTo-Json) # Expect: fleet_paused = True, reason = "platform separation v2 in progress"

decision.choice: Keep module-level REPO_ROOT constant AND add repo_root kwarg defaulting to REPO_ROOT.
decision.rationale: Backward-compat for any in-process import-side caller that references the constant. Forward-compat by accepting a per-call override.
decision.alternative_considered: Delete REPO_ROOT entirely and force all callers through ctx.root.
decision.why_rejected: Cannot prove zero in-process callers without a deeper repo-wide search; the kwarg-default pattern is risk-free and additive.
decision.guide_action_requested: Approve OR direct EA Instance 4 to remove REPO_ROOT after confirming no callers exist.

decision.choice: Helpers that themselves called load_config receive `*, ctx: ProjectContext | None = None` with auto-resolve fallback in main path; helpers that only used REPO_ROOT receive `repo_root: Path = REPO_ROOT`.
decision.rationale: Two different concerns (config loading vs filesystem path). Separating them keeps signatures minimal at each call site.
decision.guide_action_requested: Approve as canonical helper-handling rule for files 7-13, OR mandate single-kwarg uniformity.

decision.choice: NOT addressed in 2.4 — flagged for item 2.6 disposition.
decision.rationale: 2.4 scope is config-resolution refactor only; client-API cleanup belongs to 2.6.
decision.guide_action_requested: Confirm 2.6 deferral; or override and direct fix during remaining 2.4 work.

decision.topic: Mid-stage handoff at 6 of 13 vs pushing to 9 or 10
decision.choice: Emitted v3 handoff at 6 of 13 rather than pushing into self_check + blarai_next_task_resolver + cleaner.
decision.rationale: Remaining work includes the MCP server (file 13) which is the largest single-file lift in 2.4 (19 handlers + project_id required-kwarg). Pushing further risked emergency-stop mid-MCP-refactor with partial commits or context-loss damage. Per binding ack i1-4, mid-stage handoff is the correct safety valve.
decision.guide_action_requested: Ratify the handoff timing; OR direct adjustment to future EA-instance break thresholds.
